hooks.command: cargo fmt; out=$(cargo check --all-targets --quiet --color never 2>&1) || { echo "$out"; exit 2; }
hooks.rewakeMessage: cargo check reported errors. Fix them before finishing:

hooks.command: command -v typos >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; out=$(typos --color never 2>&1) || { echo "$out"; exit 2; }
hooks.rewakeMessage: typos found spelling mistakes. Fix them, or add legitimate words to _typos.toml, before finishing:
